GB/T 13786一2022
4.2 General color rendering index
The general color rendering index shall not be lower than 92.
5 IIumination quality
The ilumination intensity in the working area (from the centre to the edge of the classing table) of
cotton color classing shall be within the range of (1 100土100) Ix. The uniformity ratio of iuminance
shall not be less than 0. 8.
6 IIlumination condition
Artificial daylighting ilumination shall be widely diffused and cover sufficient directions to allow the
cotton inspector to perceive the depth when observing the cotton sample， lumination conditions
Shall be as consistent as possible throughout the entire working area of the cotton classing room.
Glare and cross lighting are not allowed and the contrast between the light source and the brightness
of the surroundings shall be kept to a minimum level.
7 Technical requirements and installation methods of illumination units
7.1 Technical requirements
7.1.1 Artificial daylighting ilumination units shall be installed in cotton classing rooms which have
no windows or can eliminate interference from external lights.
7.1.2 The ilumination unit shall provide the required quality and intensity of ilumination on the
Surface of the cotton color classing table， According to the technical specification of the ilumination
unit，Calculation and design are performed， so the ilumination of the whole cotton grading room can
be distributed as evenly as possible. lumination units shall be enclosed with lightweight and practi-
cal use to facilitate installation ，inspection and maintenance. lt is recommended to design and install
the iumination unit together with the air conditioner.
7.1.3 员umination units shall use spectral neutral diffuse reflection glass to minimize chromatic
contrast.
7.2 Installation methods
7.2.1 Specification of ilumination unit shallbe 0.6mx1.2mor0.6 mx0.6 m.

1
